name: Ralph Lauren Corporation
description: Ralph Lauren Corporation is a global leader in the design, marketing, and distribution of luxury lifestyle products across five categories: apparel, footwear and accessories, home, fragrances, and hospitality. Founded in 1967, the company has built a reputation for timeless style and authenticity. Its diverse portfolio includes brands such as Polo Ralph Lauren, Ralph Lauren Luxury, and Lauren Ralph Lauren. Headquartered in New York City, the corporation operates internationally, driven by a commitment to inspire the dream of a better life through its distinctive image and high-quality products.
